## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles (`./gradlew build`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] ktlint passes (`./gradlew ktlintCheck`)
- [ ] Public API uses `@SculkStable`, `@SculkExperimental`, or `@SculkInternal`
- [ ] Java compatibility maintained (builder provided if DSL changed)
- [ ] No generics added to public API surfaces
- [ ] No hardcoded messages or config values
- [ ] Tests added for new behaviour
